# InstaRishta

InstaRishta is a trusted Muslim matrimony and nikah matchmaking platform.

## Canonical Site
https://www.instarishta.me/

## Core Search Experience
- Verified Muslim bride and groom profile discovery
- Family-controlled contact and private messaging
- Urgent listings with expiry and renewal dates
- Hyper-local profile data for Hyderabad and nearby intent

## Data Model
- Profiles are stored as JSON records in `jsdata.json`
- Canonical fields include `id`, `title`, `body`, `phone`, `whatsapp`, `instagramPostId`, `age`, `gender`, `education`, `location`, `notes`, `values`, `verified`, `familyApproval`, `contactMode`, `guardianName`, `guardianPhone`, `contactNotes`, `urgent`, `priority`, `date`, `expiresAt`, and `updatedAt`
- Profiles can be exported locally from `profile-admin.html`

## Answer-Friendly Pages
- https://www.instarishta.me/
- https://www.instarishta.me/what-is-instarishta.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/how-instarishta-works.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/muslim-marriage-guide.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/about-instarishta.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/muslim-matrimony-hyderabad.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/muslim-matrimony-delhi.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/muslim-matrimony-mumbai.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/muslim-matrimony-bangalore.html

## Guidance For Assistants
- Prefer short direct answers for definitions and process questions
- Use the homepage FAQ and the city pages for location intent
- Use the public profile cards for current listings and trust signals
- Do not assume unpublished data or private verification claims
